channel.title: Maxim Autos — Vehicle Inventory
channel.description: Used vehicles for sale at Maxim Autos in Skokie, IL 60077. Phone +18475108947.

item.g:title: 2015 Honda Civic SE
item.g:description: 2015 Honda Civic SE Sedan, 130,772 miles, all black inside and out. The SE was Honda's Special Edition, slotted right between the base LX and the higher EX, and it is the trim Civic shoppers hunt for. It bundles roughly $1,100 in added equipment over the LX, which is why clean SE models hold value and move fast. Easy on gas, easy to drive, a perfect first car or daily commuter for the North Shore. The AC blows ice cold, so your summer commute stays cool and comfortable. The standout is Honda LaneWatch. Flip your right turn signal and a camera in the passenger mirror shows your entire blind spot on the 7 inch touchscreen, so lane changes feel a lot safer. That same screen runs Display Audio with Bluetooth and smartphone integration, plus a backup camera. The SE also adds automatic climate control, cruise control, push button start, smart entry, USB input, and alloy wheels. Under the hood is Honda's proven 1.8 liter four cylinder paired with a smooth automatic CVT and front wheel drive, EPA rated 30 city and 39 highway. These engines routinely run past 300,000 miles on basic maintenance, so at 130,772 miles this one is barely broken in, and the 2015 Civic earned an IIHS Top Safety Pick. The Maxim Autos Difference Independent inspection report included with every vehicle Metal plates issued on the spot, drive home today Transparent pricing, no hidden fees Financing for all credit levels Skokie, IL. Serving Evanston, Niles, Morton Grove, Lincolnwood, Des Plaines, North Shore Chicago. Call (847) 510-8947 for a same day appointment. Every car inspected. Every price transparent. Every customer protected.
item.g:google_product_category: Vehicles & Parts > Vehicles > Motor Vehicles > Cars, Trucks & Vans

item.g:title: 2019 Honda HR-V LX AWD
item.g:description: 2019 Honda HR-V LX AWD, the small SUV that lives bigger than its footprint. Black on black, CVT automatic, 1.8L i-VTEC engine with Real Time AWD. Easy to park in the city, easy on gas on the highway, and ready for four seasons of Chicago weather. Key features: Real Time AWD with Intelligent Control, Honda's Magic Seat second row that folds flat or flips up for tall cargo, multi angle rearview camera, Bluetooth audio and phone, cruise control, alloy wheels, and an EPA rated 27 city and 31 highway MPG. Fold the rear seats and the HR-V opens up 57.6 cubic feet of cargo room, among the best of any small SUV. The Maxim Autos Difference Independent inspection report included with every vehicle Metal plates issued on the spot, drive home today Transparent pricing, no hidden fees Financing for all credit levels Located in Skokie, IL, minutes from Evanston, Niles, Morton Grove, Lincolnwood, and Des Plaines, serving the entire North Shore Chicago area. Call (847) 510-8947 to set up a same day appointment. Every car inspected. Every price transparent. Every customer protected.
item.g:google_product_category: Vehicles & Parts > Vehicles > Motor Vehicles > Cars, Trucks & Vans

item.g:title: 2017 Volkswagen Golf Alltrack S 4Motion AWD
item.g:description: 2017 Volkswagen Golf Alltrack TSI S, 4Motion AWD, heated seats, Apple CarPlay and Android Auto. White on gray leatherette, 1.8L turbo engine, 6 speed DSG automatic. The wagon that hauls like a crossover and drives like a Golf, ready for Chicago in every season. Key features: standard 4Motion AWD, 170 hp 1.8L turbo engine, heated front seats, leatherette seating, touchscreen with Apple CarPlay and Android Auto, rearview camera, Bluetooth, cruise control, alloy wheels, rear spoiler, and a 5 star NHTSA safety rating. With 6.9 inches of ground clearance and a deep, unobstructed cargo bay, it carries bikes, strollers, or a full airport run without breaking a sweat. The Maxim Autos Difference Independent inspection report included with every vehicle Metal plates issued on the spot, drive home today Transparent pricing, no hidden fees Financing for all credit levels Located in Skokie, IL, minutes from Evanston, Niles, Morton Grove, Lincolnwood, and Des Plaines, serving the North Shore Chicago area. Call (847) 510-8947 to schedule a same day appointment. Every car inspected. Every price transparent. Every customer protected.
item.g:google_product_category: Vehicles & Parts > Vehicles > Motor Vehicles > Cars, Trucks & Vans

item.g:title: 2016 Honda CR-V LX AWD
item.g:description: 2016 Honda CR-V LX. Remote start, cooled down by the time you enter, AWD, backup cam, and legendary reliability. Silver on charcoal, automatic, 2.4L. A family SUV ready for Chicago summer road trips and year round commuting in the suburbs. The AC blows ice cold, and it is great on gas for an SUV, returning up to 31 mpg on the highway. Key features: 4WD, Honda's bulletproof 2.4L engine, automatic transmission, sport utility 4 door configuration, A/C, power windows and locks, cruise control. Practical cargo space and rear seat room, perfect first family car or commuter. The Maxim Autos Difference Independent inspection report included with every vehicle Metal plates issued on the spot, drive home today Transparent pricing, no hidden fees Financing for all credit levels Located in Skokie, IL, serving Evanston, Niles, Morton Grove, Lincolnwood, Des Plaines, and the entire North Shore Chicago area. Same day appointments available, call or stop by today. Every car inspected. Every price transparent. Every customer protected.
item.g:google_product_category: Vehicles & Parts > Vehicles > Motor Vehicles > Cars, Trucks & Vans

item.g:title: 2015 Volvo XC60 2015.5 T6 R-Design Platinum
item.g:description: 2015 Volvo XC60 T6 R-Design Platinum. 325 HP Turbo, AWD, Paddle Shifters, Harman Kardon Audio, Panoramic Sunroof, Navigation, Adaptive Cruise Control, Full Safety Package. Gray on black, automatic, 3.0L Turbo. A Scandinavian performance crossover that looks refined and drives like a sports car, 0 to 60 in roughly 6 seconds. Surprisingly easy on gas for a 325 horsepower all wheel drive performance SUV, returning up to 24 mpg on the highway. Dual zone climate control blows ice cold, so the cabin stays comfortable through the hottest Chicago summer. Key features: turbocharged 3.0L inline six with 325 HP and 365 lb-ft of torque, all wheel drive, paddle shifters, R-Design sport package with 20 inch alloy wheels, aggressive front grille, rear diffuser and dual exhausts, sport leather seats with heat front and rear, heated steering wheel, panoramic sunroof, Harman Kardon 12 speaker premium audio, navigation, power tailgate, proximity keyless entry, Adaptive Cruise Control with queue assist, Collision Warning with auto brake, Pedestrian Detection, Blind Spot Information System, and Lane Departure Warning. Nearly 9 inches of ground clearance and over 67 cubic feet of cargo with rear seats folded. The Maxim Autos Difference Independent inspection report included with every vehicle Metal plates issued on the spot, drive home today Transparent pricing, no hidden fees Financing for all credit levels Located in Skokie, IL, serving Evanston, Niles, Morton Grove, Lincolnwood, Des Plaines, and the entire North Shore Chicago area. Same day appointments available, call or stop by today. Every car inspected. Every price transparent. Every customer protected.
